evals.prompt: Run a security check on the current project before I commit. I just added some API integration code and want to make sure I didn't leave any keys in the source.
evals.expected_output: A structured safety check report table showing any hardcoded secrets, injection risks, or dependency issues found in the codebase, with file paths and line numbers.

evals.prompt: I pushed some code that has database queries and user input handling. Can you do a quick security scan to see if there are any injection vulnerabilities?
evals.expected_output: A report focusing on SQL injection and XSS patterns, checking grep results in context and only flagging actual risks (not parameterized queries or static strings).

evals.prompt: 보안 검사 해줘. 새로 추가한 인증 코드에 문제 없는지 확인하고 싶어.
evals.expected_output: A safety check report in the user's language (Korean) covering all 4 scan areas, with particular attention to the authentication code for hardcoded credentials and injection patterns.
